title: Traditional Greek Loukoumades with Honey
description: A sweet and crispy Greek dessert made with fried dough balls drizzled with honey. This traditional recipe is perfect for special occasions or everyday treats.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and salt in a large bowl.
Gradually add milk and honey to the dry ingredients, mixing until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Punch down the dough and cut it into small balls. Fry the balls in batches until they are golden brown.
Drain the loukoumades on paper towels and serve warm with a drizzle of honey.
